# 💢 Feature / Enhancement Pull Request

## Related Issue
- Link the issue(s) this PR addresses:
  Closes #<issue_number>

## Description
- What feature or enhancement is being introduced?
- Why is this needed?
- How does it improve the FireHub ecosystem?
- Context / design notes / screenshots (if applicable):

## Feature Overview

### Functional Changes
- Key changes:
  - Change 1
  - Change 2

### API / Behavior Changes
- Public API changes:
  - ...
- Internal behavior changes:
  - ...

### Dependencies
- Added / Updated / Removed:
  - ...

### Compatibility
- Backward compatible:
  - [ ] Yes
  - [ ] No (explain below)

## Testing

### Validation
- [ ] Feature implemented according to requirements
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] Edge cases verified

### Automated Tests
- [ ] Unit tests added / updated
- [ ] Integration tests added / updated
- [ ] Test coverage updated
- [ ] All CI checks pass

## Documentation
- [ ] Changelog updated
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Usage examples added / updated
- [ ] Migration notes are added (if applicable)

## Checklist
- [ ] Issue linked
- [ ] Feature clearly described
- [ ] No unrelated changes are included
- [ ] Code self-reviewed
- [ ] Follows FireHub coding standards

## Risks / Impact
- Risk level:
  - [ ] None
  - [ ] Low
  - [ ] Medium
  - [ ] High

- Side effects:
  - ...
- Affected modules:
  - Core / Runtime / Adapter / Capability
